import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(csv_file_path, col1_name="column1", col2_name="column2"):
    # Read CSV file and create DataFrame
    df = pd.read_csv(csv_file_path)

    # Ensure the required columns are present
    assert col1_name in df.columns and col2_name in df.columns, f"Required columns ({col1_name} and {col2_name}) not found in the CSV file."

    # Group DataFrame by col1_name and calculate grouped mean for col2_name
    df_mean = df.groupby(col1_name)[col2_name].mean().reset_index()

    # Create a bar plot of the grouped mean values
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(df_mean[col1_name], df_mean[col2_name])

    # Configure the plot with title and axis labels
    ax.set_title(f'Mean of {col2_name} Grouped by {col1_name}')
    ax.set_xlabel(col1_name)
    ax.set_ylabel(f'Mean of {col2_name}')

    # Return the generated Axes object and DataFrame containing mean values
    return ax, df_mean
